violations.text: Rhode Island Food Safety Manager license expired. FMC to re-instate. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025

Food contact surfaces of the can opener were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
Splash guard required between food prep sink and 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2023
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

The cutting boards on the prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
Several ceiling tiles in meat smoker prep room were observed in poor repair. Materials for ceiling tiles to be smooth, durable and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
